articles.title: Delta suspends 'specialty services' perk for members of Congress, cites DHS shutdown
articles.summary: Delta Air Lines' move comes as airports around the U.S. are seeing extra-long security lines as a result of elevated absences by TSA agents.

articles.title: Czerwona sesja na GPW. CD Projekt w dół, Żabka liderem wzrostów
articles.summary: Wtorkowa sesja na warszawskiej giełdzie zakończyła się spadkami większości spółek z indeksu WIG20. Z rynkowych danych wynika, że najmocniej tracił CD Projekt, a sektor bankowy pociągnął indeks w dół. Na zielono zaświeciły jedynie walory Żabki, Orlenu i Pepco.

articles.title: Ile kosztuje funt? Kurs funta do złotego PLN/GBP 24.03.2026
articles.summary: Kurs funta szterlinga - 24.03.2026. We wtorek o godz. 18:45 za jednego funta brytyjskiego (GBP) trzeba zapłacić 4,9388 zł.

articles.title: Ile kosztuje frank szwajcarski? Kurs franka do złotego PLN/CHF 24.03.2026
articles.summary: Kurs franka szwajcarskiego - 24.03.2026. We wtorek za jednego franka (CHF) trzeba zapłacić 4,6848 zł.

articles.title: Ile kosztuje euro? Kurs euro do złotego PLN/EUR 24.03.2026
articles.summary: Kurs euro - 24.03.2026. We wtorek po południu za jedno euro (EUR) trzeba zapłacić 4,2728 zł.

articles.title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term
articles.summary: JPMorgan Chase CEO Jamie Dimon issued an optimistic viewpoint on Middle East peace, weeks into the war with Iran.

articles.title: Pfizer to seek FDA approval for Lyme disease vaccine candidate despite trial miss
articles.summary: Lyme disease is an illness caused by bacteria most commonly spread to humans from ticks. It can cause arthritis, muscle weakness and pain.

articles.title: FedEx launches same-day delivery with OneRail as Amazon, Walmart boost their speeds
articles.summary: FedEx announced it's partnering with last-mile delivery company OneRail to bring same-day delivery to all of its customers.

articles.title: Gap says it will launch checkout within Google's Gemini, in an AI first from a major fashion company
articles.summary: Gap's partnership with Gemini and its customer-facing AI tools give it a competitive edge at a time when winning in specialty retail is harder than ever.

articles.title: More women are entering wealth management, but few are in advisory roles, study finds
articles.summary: Women have yet to gain ground in client-facing roles that are better-paid and more likely to lead to executive roles, per a recent study.

articles.title: Moody's cuts rating on private credit fund run by KKR and Future Standard to junk as bad loans grow
articles.summary: The move by Moody's is the latest sign of distress in private credit; retail investors have been rushing to withdraw funds, from Blackstone to Apollo.

articles.title: EV battery startup pivots to defense industry amid Iran war, weak electric vehicle market
articles.summary: Former GM executive CEO Pamela Fletcher told CNBC "the faster path, and frankly, a big need, is out there in this defense space."

articles.title: Pro Padel League raises $15 million as investors bet on sport’s U.S. growth
articles.summary: The Pro Padel League has raised $15 million in new funding as it looks to accelerate its next phase of growth in the U.S.

articles.title: Apollo gives investors only 45% of requested withdrawals from $15 billion private credit fund
articles.summary: The withdrawals show that Apollo didn't avoid the rush of investor redemptions plaguing rivals, driven by concern over private credit loans to software firms.

articles.title: Nissan’s new hybrid is a U.S.-first that mixes EV driving with a gas engine
articles.summary: Nissan plans to introduce a new type of hybrid for the U.S. market that drives like an all-electric vehicle but is powered by a traditional gas-powered engine.

articles.title: Estée Lauder is in talks to merge with Puig amid ongoing turnaround plan
articles.summary: Estée Lauder said Monday the company is in talks to potentially merge with Spanish beauty company Puig.

articles.title: WNBPA President Nneka Ogwumike says new CBA will have a major impact on players' bank accounts
articles.summary: WNBPA President Nneka Ogwumike told CNBC significant pay raises for WNBA players could change their off-season routines.

articles.title: The price of menstrual products is skyrocketing from inflation, tariffs
articles.summary: With rising inflation and changing tariff policies, menstrual products have seen a drastic rise in price over the past few years.

articles.title: ICE deployed to some U.S. airports as long security lines persist during partial shutdown
articles.summary: The Trump administration said it plans to send ICE officers to help ease airport congestion amid TSA officer absences as they face second missed full paycheck.

articles.title: Toyota to invest $1 billion to increase U.S. production in Kentucky, Indiana plants
articles.summary: Toyota on Monday announced $1 billion in investments in two U.S. plants as part of a plan to invest up to $10 billion domestically over the next five years.

articles.title: GLP-1 drugs are changing how Americans eat. Food companies are racing to catch up
articles.summary: For restaurants and food companies, the increasing adoption of GLP-1 drugs present both an opportunity and a threat to their businesses.

articles.title: The spring housing market is on, but mortgage rates just shot higher. Here's what to know.
articles.summary: This spring's housing market is on, but economic headwinds are pushing back most of the advantage that buyers have gained over the past year in affordability.

articles.title: Nexstar, Tegna merger closes after winning regulatory approval
articles.summary: Nexstar has closed its $6.2 billion acquisition of Tegna after winning approval from the Federal Communications Commission and Department of Justice.
